title: Data from cell lines of the project "Optimisation of PK/PD parameters of a repurposed drug therapy for patients with SMA".
author: Artero, Ruben
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Different measurements in haloperidol-treated SMA and control cells (non-differentiated or differentiated, as indicated for toxicity) at the indicated concentrations, including toxicity assays and SMN protein levels.  A Duolink Assay was also performed to elucidate a possible interaction between haloperidol and the Sigma-1 receptor in SMA cells.
steps_raw: Different measurements in haloperidol-treated SMA and control cells (non-differentiated or differentiated, as indicated for toxicity) at the indicated concentrations, including toxicity assays and SMN protein levels.  A Duolink Assay was also performed to elucidate a possible interaction between haloperidol and the Sigma-1 receptor in SMA cells.
